title: viola tokubuchiana var. extremiorientalis
intro: Viola tokubuchiana var. extremiorientalis, also known as a variant of the Japanese mountain pansy, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the violet family (Violaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Viola tokubuchiana var. extremiorientalis include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
